- 4 red blocks (9 pixels each) at various positions

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me move the character LEFT to pull it out of the green rectangle
# Then I can try to approach from a different angle

# First, let me check the current character position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
char_node = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 135:
        char_node = n
        break

if char_node:
    b = char_node['boundary']
    minr = min(r for r,c in b)
    maxr = max(r for r,c in b)
    minc = min(c for r,c in b)
    maxc = max(c for r,c in b)
    print(f"Character: rows {minr}-{maxr}, cols {minc}-{maxc}")

# Move LEFT several times to pull out of green rectangle
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
